sentences.target: La dispute m'a vraiment fatigué aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: La dispute m'a vraiment fatigué aujourd'hui.
translations.en: The argument really tired me out today.
translations.es: La discusión de hoy me agotó de verdad.
translations.de: Der Streit hat mich heute wirklich erschöpft.
translations.it: La discussione di oggi mi ha davvero stancato.
translations.ko: 오늘 그 말다툼 때문에 정말 지쳤어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天的争吵真的让我很累。
translations.yue: 今日嘅爭吵真係令我好攰。
translations.pt: A discussão de hoje me deixou realmente exausto.
translations.vi: Cuộc cãi vã hôm nay thật sự làm tôi mệt mỏi.
translations.nl: De ruzie heeft me vandaag echt uitgeput.
translations.hi: आज की बहस ने मुझे सच में थका दिया.
translations.el: Ο σημερινός τσακωμός με κούρασε πραγματικά.
translations.nb: Krangelen i dag gjorde meg virkelig sliten.
translations.id: Pertengkaran hari ini benar-benar membuatku lelah.
translations.sv: Dagens gräl gjorde mig verkligen trött.
translations.ro: Cearta de azi m-a obosit cu adevărat.
translations.da: Dagens skænderi gjorde mig virkelig træt.
translations.ja: 今日の口論で本当に疲れた。

tokens.explanation: Definite feminine singular article introducing the noun as subject.
Common noun; here the subject of the clause.
1st-person singular clitic object pronoun, elided before a vowel; direct object of the verb.
Auxiliary (3sg present) forming the passé composé with the past participle; agrees with the subject 'La dispute'.
Degree adverb modifying the past participle.
Past participle serving as the main verb in a compound tense (passé composé) with 'avoir'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.

sentences.target: Ils ont une dispute au dîner.

translations.fr: Ils ont une dispute au dîner.
translations.en: They have an argument at dinner.
translations.es: Tienen una discusión en la cena.
translations.ko: 그들은 저녁 식사 때 말다툼을 한다.
translations.vi: Họ cãi nhau trong bữa tối.
translations.nl: Ze maken ruzie tijdens het avondeten.
translations.hi: वे रात के खाने पर बहस करते हैं.
translations.ja: 彼らは夕食のときに言い争いをする。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb (3pl present) meaning 'have'.
Indefinite feminine singular article introducing the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'ont'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le' (à + le); introduces the prepositional complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: On évite la dispute devant les enfants.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ evit la dispyt dəvɑ̃ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/

translations.fr: On évite la dispute devant les enfants.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ evit la dispyt dəvɑ̃ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/
translations.en: We avoid arguing in front of the kids.
translations.es: Evitamos discutir delante de los niños.
translations.de: Wir vermeiden Streit vor den Kindern.
translations.it: Evitiamo di litigare davanti ai bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们避免在孩子面前争吵。
translations.yue: 我哋避免喺小朋友面前嘈交。
translations.pt: Evitamos discutir na frente das crianças.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh cãi nhau trước mặt bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: We vermijden ruzie in het bijzijn van de kinderen.
translations.hu: Kerüljük, hogy a gyerekek előtt vitatkozzunk.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों के सामने बहस करने से बचते हैं.
translations.el: Αποφεύγουμε να τσακωνόμαστε μπροστά στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi unngår å krangle foran barna.
translations.id: Kami menghindari bertengkar di depan anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi undviker att bråka framför barnen.
translations.ro: Evităm să ne certăm în fața copiilor.
translations.da: Vi undgår at skændes foran børnene.
translations.ja: 私たちは子どもの前で言い争いを避ける。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun often used for 'we' in colloquial French.
Main verb (3sg present) describing the action.
Definite feminine singular article introducing the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'évite'.
Preposition introducing a spatial/figurative complement.
Definite plural article introducing the noun complement of the preposition.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Je veux régler cette dispute calmement.

translations.fr: Je veux régler cette dispute calmement.
translations.en: I want to settle this argument calmly.
translations.es: Quiero resolver esta discusión con calma.
translations.de: Ich möchte diesen Streit in Ruhe klären.
translations.it: Voglio risolvere questa discussione con calma.
translations.ko: 나는 이 말다툼을 차분하게 해결하고 싶다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想冷静地解决这场争执。
translations.yue: 我想冷靜咁解決呢場爭吵。
translations.ru: Я хочу спокойно урегулировать эту ссору.
translations.pt: Quero resolver esta discussão com calma.
translations.he: אני רוצה ליישב את הוויכוח הזה ברוגע.
translations.tr: Bu tartışmayı sakin bir şekilde çözmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn giải quyết cuộc tranh cãi này một cách bình tĩnh.
translations.ar: أريد أن أحل هذا الخلاف بهدوء.
translations.nl: Ik wil deze ruzie rustig oplossen.
translations.uk: Я хочу спокійно вирішити цю сварку.
translations.hu: Szeretném ezt a vitát nyugodtan rendezni.
translations.hi: मैं इस बहस को शांति से सुलझाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να λύσω αυτόν τον τσακωμό ήρεμα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil løse denne krangelen på en rolig måte.
translations.id: Aku ingin menyelesaikan pertengkaran ini dengan tenang.
translations.sv: Jag vill lösa det här grälet lugnt.
translations.ro: Vreau să rezolv această ceartă cu calm.
translations.da: Jeg vil løse dette skænderi på en rolig måde.
translations.ja: 私はこの口論を冷静に解決したい。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb (1sg present) expressing desire.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'veux'.
Demonstrative feminine singular determiner modifying 'dispute'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'régler'.
Manner adverb modifying the verbal phrase ('régler ... calmement').

Je veux régler cette dispute calmement.

We avoid arguing in front of the kids.
I want to settle this argument calmly.
